lanes.goal: Define the parallel lane artifact and CLI contract.
lanes.expected_output: Parallel lane schemas, writer, CLI routing, and release-state integration.
lanes.stop_condition: Stop if lane-local evidence cannot be represented as required schema fields.

lanes.goal: Verify missing lane and join evidence fails before release.
lanes.expected_output: Parallel lane audit with negative and positive checks.
lanes.stop_condition: Stop if missing pilot, missing join, or unresolved lane refs can pass.

join_packet.conflict_summary: No unresolved lane conflict; contract and verification lanes converge on narrow runtime evidence.
join_packet.blocker_summary: No active blocker after focused runtime tests and Council review.
join_packet.merge_rationale: Both lanes have lane-local outputs, verification refs, and Council-approved join semantics.

not_proven: Parallel Lane Pilot evidence does not prove autonomous scheduling, speed improvement, semantic correctness, or external adoption.
